name: signaltrail
description: Minimal secure Electron recorder for screenshots, mouse telemetry, and JSONL session storage.

scripts.package:mac:dev: npm run build:native && npx @electron/packager . SignalTrail --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --app-bundle-id=com.replayai.signaltrail.dev --icon=src/renderer/assets/signaltrail-logo.icns --asar.unpack="**/keyboard-monitor.swift" --out=dist --overwrite && node scripts/copy-packaged-native.mjs
